zh.Middleham, Yorkshire, England: 英國英格蘭越可爾米德勒哈姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Ranulph FitzRobert於大約1185年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾米德勒哈姆時，他的父親Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham42歲，母親Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham38歲。他和Mary Bigod至少有2個兒子。他去世於1252年12月7日在英國英格蘭越可爾可福哈姆享年68歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭諾斯 越可爾可福哈姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ranulph FitzRobert于大约1185年出生在英国英格兰越可爾米德勒哈姆时，他的父亲Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham42岁，母亲Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham38岁。他和Mary Bigod至少有2个儿子。他去世于1252年12月7日在英国英格兰越可爾可福哈姆享年68岁，埋葬在英国英格兰諾斯 越可爾可福哈姆。

en.Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, Unit: Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
en.lifeSummary: When Ranulph FitzRobert was born about 1185, in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham, was 42 and his mother, Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham, was 38. He had at least 2 sons with Mary Bigod. He died on 7 December 1252, in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 68, and was buried in Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ranulph FitzRobert est né environ 1185, à Middleham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham, avait 42 ans et sa mère, Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham, avait 38 ans. Il a eu au moins 2 fils avec Mary Bigod. Il est décédé le 7 décembre 1252, à Coverham, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 68 ans, et a été enterré à Coverham, North Yorkshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, Unit: Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Ranulph FitzRobert um 1185 in Middleham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham 42 und seine Mutter Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham 38. Er hatte mit Mary Bigod mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 7. Dezember 1252 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Coverham, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Coverham, North Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph FitzRobert è nato il circa 1185 nel Middleham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham, aveva 42 anni e il suo madre, Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham, aveva 38 anni. Lui avuto almeno 2 figli con Mary Bigod. Morì il 7 dicembre 1252, nel Coverham, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 68 anni, e fu sepolto a Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.Swainby Abbey, North Riding, Yorkshire,: イギリスヨークシュアイアスワインビー
ja.lifeSummary: Ranulph FitzRobertが約1185年にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアミッドレハムで生まれた時，父Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middlehamは42歳，母Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverhamは38歳であった。彼はMary Bigodとの間に少なくとも2人の息子をもうけた。彼は1252年12月7日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアコバーハムで68歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスノース ヨークシュアイアコバーハムにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ranulph FitzRobert(이)가 대략 1185년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 미들레함에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham(은)는 42세였고, 그의 어머니 Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham(은)는 38세였다. 그는 Mary Bigod(와)과 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1252년 12월 7일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 커버함에서 68세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 노르스 요르크실르 커버함에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ranulph FitzRobert nasceu aproximadamente 1185, em Middleham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham, tinha 42 anos e sua mãe, Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham, tinha 38 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 2 filhos com Mary Bigod. Ele faleceu em 7 de dezembro de 1252, em Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 68 anos, e foi sepultado em Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ranulph FitzRobert родился около 1185 г. в местности миддлэам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Robert FitzRalph Lord of Middleham было 42 года, а матери, которую звали Helewise De Glanville Fitzranulf Lady of Coverham, 38. У него было по крайней мере 2 сына от Mary Bigod. Он умер 7 декабря 1252 г. в местности ковирам, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 68 лет и был похоронен в местности ковирам, норт еркшир, Англия, Великобритания.

Tuvo por lo menos 2 hijos con Mary Bigod. Murió el 7 de diciembre de 1252, en Coverham, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 68 años, y fue sepultado en Coverham, North Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
